task: Same task applied to competitor: find marketing/WordPress courses and enroll.

findings: Page fetches return only CSS and JavaScript — no readable content
Title visible: 'Los mejores Cursos de Marketing Digital Presencial y Online' — but no other content accessible
AI agent cannot determine course offerings, pricing, or how to enroll

test_b_comprehension.note: Only the page title communicates anything. AI knows it's a marketing school in Madrid, but nothing else. No structured data, no readable course catalog, no pricing.

test_c_action.note: No forms, no contact info, no enrollment mechanism accessible to AI agent. Site is functionally invisible.

overall.comparison_headline: Escuela Emprende scores 6.0/10 (C) vs Aula CM's 0.5/10 (F). Escuela Emprende is significantly more visible to AI agents than its competitor.
